data.title: Independent Bank Corporation Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend On Common Stock
data.description: Grand Rapids, Michigan - On April 21, 2026, Independent Bank Corporation (NASDAQ: IBCP) disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.28 per share on its common stock. This dividend will be distributed on May 14, 2026, to shareholders on record as of May 4, 2026. Independent Bank, a community bank based in Michigan, operates under the holding company, Independent Bank Corporation.

data.title: Heritage Store Introduces New 12 oz. Rosewater and Rosewater & Glycerin Facial Mists, Expanding a Cult Favorite Since the 1970s
data.description: A renowned skincare brand, Heritage Store, known for its top-rated facial mist, has unveiled an expansion with a larger 12 oz. size, along with an enhanced micro mist sprayer for a more delicate and effective hydration experience. With a legacy of over 50 years in the industry, Heritage Store continues to innovate and cater to its loyal customer base by offering a superior product that ensures a refreshing and moisturizing effect. This development signals the brand's commitment to providing quality skincare solutions, further solidifying its position as a leader in the market.

data.title: South Carolina Hemp and CBD Retailers Sound Alarm: H.3924 Threatens Local Wellness Industry with Vote Scheduled for This Week
data.description: In Columbia, South Carolina, as of April 21, 2026, a crucial legislative vote is set for this week. South Carolina residents, including business owners and consumers, are being urged to reach out to House members promptly to oppose H.3924. This bill is facing criticism for its expansive reach and potential impact on small businesses. It is vital for stakeholders to voice their concerns and advocate for the rejection of this legislation.

data.title: CollectiveMinds LLC Places Keith Meadors as Chief Commercial Officer at Genova Diagnostics
data.description: CollectiveMinds LLC, a cutting-edge executive search firm, has recently placed Keith Meadors, MBA, MT(ASCP), a highly experienced diagnostics leader, in a significant commercial position at Genova to facilitate the company's future expansion. The placement was announced on April 21, 2026, in Herndon, Virginia.

data.title: LiveBy Local Launches Automated Hyperlocal Marketing Platform for Real Estate Agents, Keeping Agents Top of Mind with Every Contact in Their Database
data.description: LiveBy Local, based in Dallas, offers automated personalized hyperlocal market reports and community guides to agents. This service helps agents establish themselves as local experts by providing valuable information to their databases.

data.title: France has seen a surge in violent 'wrench attacks' targeting crypto investors. Gunman hits one victim in recent incident.
data.description: In France, a criminal disguised as a delivery person assaulted a cryptocurrency investor in a disturbing incident, highlighting an increase in violent attacks, known as 'wrench attacks', aimed at individuals holding digital assets. This incident sheds light on the growing trend of criminals resorting to physical violence to target cryptocurrency holders.

data.title: Introducing Trump Tower Tbilisi, A New Landmark for Global Luxury Living
data.description: A new development project called Trump Tower Tbilisi has been announced by Biograpi Living, Archi Group, The Sapir Organization, Blox Group, and Finvest Georgia in collaboration with The Trump Organization. This marks the first Trump branded project in the region, signaling Tbilisi's growth as a business hub and gateway for international business in Eastern Europe and Asia. The project is designed by Gens and aims to cater to the increasing demand for luxury properties, showcasing the city's rising profile among global buyers.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P 500 Fall As Oil Spikes; Amazon Lifts These Names (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index experienced a downturn while oil prices surged, causing a rally. UnitedHealth saw a significant increase in its stock value. The S&P 500 also fell alongside the Dow. Amazon's performance positively impacted certain companies.

data.title: FOCUS Hires Carrier-Side Operations Leader to Build the Next Generation of Insurance Service Delivery
data.description: The recently appointed Senior Vice President of Operations brings close to 20 years of expertise in carrier-side transformation and leadership in underwriting practices in North America to the prominent insurance operations partner catering to MGAs, regional carriers, and specialty programs. The individual joined the company in Sunrise, Florida on April 21, 2026.

data.title: GDE Tree Services Expands Operations Across Logan, Ipswich and the Gold Coast
data.description: A company named GDE Tree Services, which has been offering professional arborist services since 1987, recently revealed its expansion to Logan, Ipswich, and the Gold Coast in Australia due to increasing demand in the South East region. This move comes as a response to the rise in requests for their services.

data.title: Indo-Pacific Commander Calls Bitcoin A Tool For U.S. 'Power Projection' In Senate Testimony
data.description: Today, Admiral Samuel Paparo, Commander of the United States Indo-Pacific Command, informed the Senate Armed Services Committee that he sees immense possibilities in Bitcoin for national security. This statement was made during the committee meeting in Washington on April 21, 2026. Admiral Paparo emphasized the remarkable potential that Bitcoin holds in the realm of national security.

data.title: First Farmers Financial Corp. Declares Record Dividend
data.description: Converse, Indiana - On April 21, 2026, First Farmers Financial Corp disclosed plans for a two-for-one stock split. This decision means that shareholders will receive an additional share for each share owned, effectively doubling the total number of outstanding shares. This move is expected to increase liquidity and make shares more accessible to a wider pool of investors.
